meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Deployment Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship production-ready apps at lightning speed. Start building now.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is a workflow bottleneck, not a technical dead end. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your environment, automate CI/CD pipelines, and leverage Claude Code to resolve configuration drift. This shift ensures your freelance projects move from local development to live production in minutes.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting a perfect MVP, but the moment you hit deploy, the build fails. The air in your office grows heavy with the scent of burnt midnight oil and broken production logs. Deployment shouldn't be a gamble; it should be a background process that runs while you move to your next billable client.

This guide introduces the Antigravity project template, a high-velocity framework designed to eliminate deployment friction. By marrying this architecture with Claude Code, you transform from a developer struggling with server configs into a high-leverage architect who ships reliable, production-ready code on autopilot.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces environment consistency across all your freelance projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity base template, including auto-configured Dockerfile, GitHub Actions for CI/CD, and environment variable validation.

steps.title: Configure Automated Environment Injection
steps.description: Ensure your secrets and environment variables are strictly separated from your source code to prevent deployment failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity environment manager to map local .env files to production secrets using Vault or standard secret injection.

steps.title: Define Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the necessary Terraform or Pulumi definitions required by the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate infrastructure as code definitions for AWS/GCP to support the current project architecture, ensuring deployment readiness.

steps.title: Implement Automated Health Checks
steps.description: Add pre-deployment validation hooks that prevent broken code from ever touching your production servers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject Antigravity health-check middleware that validates API connectivity and database schema parity before deployment.

steps.title: Execute One-Click Deployment
steps.description: Trigger the final deployment sequence to verify that your CI/CD pipeline is fully operational.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the deployment validation suite to ensure all Antigravity pipeline stages are green.

pro_tips: Always use a 'staging' environment variable prefix to catch config errors before they break production.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' flag on every PR to catch potential deployment blockers before they reach the main branch.
Use Antigravity's built-in logging adapter to pipe errors directly to your Slack channel for real-time monitoring.
Keep your Docker image footprint under 200MB to maximize deployment speed and minimize cold-start latency.
Audit your dependencies weekly using the Antigravity security scanner to prevent supply-chain deployment blocks.
resources: Infrastructure as Code Best Practices: https://iac-guide.io
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is successful, clone the template to your GitHub 'Templates' repository to reuse it for all future client projects, effectively cutting your setup time by 80%.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your infrastructure and start scaling your freelance business with a system that works as hard as you do. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
